creator: mohacsi@niif.hu
text:
Dear Oli,




On Tue, 10 Apr 2012, Olli Hauer wrote:

> Hi Janos,
>
> can you review both additional patches?
>
> - the first patch should fix only a GNU libc issue
>  http://www.shrubbery.net/pipermail/rancid-discuss/2012-February/006188.html

You are right. This is not necessary.

>
> - the second patch is at the moment not confirmed (maybe make it optional)
>  http://www.shrubbery.net/pipermail/rancid-discuss/2012-February/006235.html
>

This is very useful, for IOS-XR  users. The email comment you sent is 
referring to a different problem.

Best Regards,
 		Janos Mohacsi
